# OpenDesign

> 把值得反复回看的网页设计沉淀成可被 AI / Agent 直接复用的设计系统规范。

**核心**: 每一个收录的网站都附带一份**机器可读的完整设计系统** —— 不是文案、不是 PSD，而是把视觉 / 布局 / 排版 / 动效 / 交互抽象成 AI（Claude / Cursor / v0 / Lovable）可直接复用的迁移指令。

**正式站点**: https://opendesign.cc/
**sitemap**: https://opendesign.cc/sitemap.xml

## 给 AI / Agent：怎么用

每个作品都有一个稳定的 **folder URL**，GET 它即得该站的设计系统：

```
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/                  → manifest.json 列出全部文件
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/DESIGN.md          → Google design.md 兼容格式（YAML + 8 段）
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/DESIGN_SPEC.en.md  → OpenDesign 11 层规范（en/zh-CN/zh-TW/ja/ko）
https://opendesign.cc/packs/<slug>/spec.json          → 11 层设计 tokens（机器可读）
```

把任意 DESIGN_SPEC.*.md 粘进你的编码 Agent，或让 Agent 直接读 folder URL —— 它会读到该站完整的 11 层设计系统并按同样的设计语言生成 / 改造页面。

本站全部内容已静态化（每站 × 5 语言独立 HTML），无需执行 JS 即可抓取。

## 完整包（Tier 2 · 含真截图 + 真 computed styles · 146 个）

这些站除文档外还含 Playwright 抓取的真实页面证据 + 按频次聚合的真 computed styles：

- [About Meta](https://opendesign.cc/packs/about-meta/) — ZIP: https://opendesign.cc/packs/about-meta/about-meta-design-pack.zip
- [Acne Studios](https://opendesign.cc/packs/acne-studios/) — ZIP: https://opendesign.cc/packs/acne-studios/acne-studios-design-pack.zip

## 全部收录（146 个）

- [About Meta](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/about-meta) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/about-meta/ · Tier-2 完整包 — The site is worth including for its sophisticated blend of corporate branding and expressive, human-centric photography with bold, clear typography.

- [Miro](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/miro) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/miro/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Miro exemplifies a professional, high-utility SaaS design that uses minimalism and a single accent color to guide user attention effectively.
- [Mistral](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mistral) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mistral/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including for its mastery of the 'editorial tech' style, where restrained UI allows bold brand patterns and clear typography to shine.
- [Mobbin](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mobbin) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mobbin/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a 'content-first' UI where the design framework intentionally recedes to highlight the diverse screenshots it displays.
- [Mongodb](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/mongodb) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/mongodb/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a prime example of modern developer tool aesthetics: clean, authoritative, and highly readable with a disciplined accent color.
- [Nike](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/nike) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/nike/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site exemplifies how a global brand achieves premium positioning through radical restraint—letting world-class photography and bold type do all the emotional work.
- [Notion](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/notion) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/notion/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A prime example of refined SaaS design, blending bold typography with a highly functional, clean interface.
- [Nvidia](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/nvidia) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/nvidia/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A prime example of a premium, technical corporate site that balances boldness with restraint.
- [Obys Agency](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/obys) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/obys/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a definitive example of avant-garde digital design, pushing the boundaries of web aesthetics through brutalist principles and complex motion.
- [Ollama](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/ollama) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/ollama/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a masterclass in developer tooling design, showing how strict minimalism and restraint can create a highly professional, trustworthy, and accessible brand identity.
- [Opal Camera Inc.](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/opal-camera) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/opal-camera/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a textbook example of modern premium hardware branding, balancing minimalist UI with warm, human-centric photography.
- [OpenAI](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/openai) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/openai/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in minimalist AI interface design, using absolute restraint and typography to build trust and authority without visual noise.
- [Opencode](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/opencode) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/opencode/ · Tier-2 完整包 — The site is a strong example of a monochromatic, monospace-driven design system that effectively communicates a technical, developer-first product identity.
- [Perplexity](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/perplexity) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/perplexity/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This page demonstrates how minimal design can effectively communicate security and build trust through pure functional clarity.
- [Pinterest](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/pinterest) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/pinterest/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a masterclass in high-volume photographic content presentation, using clean typography and a single, powerful accent color to guide the user's eye.
- [Pitch](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/pitch) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/pitch/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a modern, premium SaaS aesthetic that combines bold typography with a dark, focused canvas.
- [Playstation](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/playstation) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/playstation/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is worth including as a prime example of a premium consumer product portal that successfully balances high-impact cinematic visuals with a clean, functional, and responsive UI framework.
- [Posthog](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/posthog) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/posthog/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is worth including as a prime example of a playful, developer-focused SaaS brand that successfully balances professional utility with a fun, irreverent personality.
- [Railway](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/railway) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/railway/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including for its successful blend of elegant serif typography with a modern, dark developer tool aesthetic.
- [Rauno Freiberg](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/rauno) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/rauno/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of bold, typographic portfolio design, using extreme scale and stark contrast to create a memorable visual impact.
- [Raycast](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/raycast) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/raycast/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in restrained dark-mode design for a technical product, proving that deep blacks and minimal color can create a premium, high-performance feel.
- [Reflect](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/reflect) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/reflect/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a great example of a premium, dark-mode SaaS design that uses a single accent color and cosmic visuals to convey intelligence and calm.
- [Renault](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/renault) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/renault/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a premium corporate site that uses editorial photography and strict typographic hierarchy to convey authority and innovation.
- [Replicate](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/replicate) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/replicate/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site demonstrates excellent developer experience design with its code-first approach, clean typography, and purposeful use of color to highlight key information without overwhelming the technical content.
- [Resend](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/resend) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/resend/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Resend's design is worth including as a masterclass in high-end developer tool aesthetics, blending premium editorial typography with a stark, functional dark-mode interface.
- [Revolut](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/revolut) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/revolut/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of premium fintech design, using restrained UI to let high-quality photography and bold typography build trust and modern appeal.
- [Runwayml](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/runwayml) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/runwayml/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a perfect example of a modern, premium AI tool that uses restraint and high-quality photography to communicate complex, visionary concepts.
- [Sanity](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/sanity) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/sanity/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A strong example of a modern developer platform that uses high-contrast typography and strict spatial discipline to convey authority.
- [Sentry](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/sentry) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/sentry/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Sentry's design successfully balances technical credibility with a bold, slightly irreverent brand voice, making a complex developer tool feel accessible and modern.
- [Shopify](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/shopify) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/shopify/ · Tier-2 完整包 — An excellent example of a modern, premium SaaS design that uses a dark theme to project authority and focus, while using a single vibrant accent to guide user attention.
- [Spacex](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/spacex) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/spacex/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a prime example of a cinematic, high-contrast interface where the typography and layout are designed to disappear, making the imagery the primary focus.
- [Spotify](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/spotify) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/spotify/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a masterclass in dark-mode design and content-heavy UI, demonstrating how to maintain a clear hierarchy while keeping the focus on high-contrast imagery and typography.

- [Tesla](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/tesla) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/tesla/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Worth including as a baseline example of unstyled, system-generated error states stripped of all design systems.
- [Theverge](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/theverge) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/theverge/ · Tier-2 完整包 — The Verge's design is a benchmark for modern editorial sites, balancing bold visual identity with excellent readability and usability.

- [Vercel](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/vercel) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/vercel/ · Tier-2 完整包 — This site is a definitive example of modern, developer-focused design, combining stark minimalism with high-contrast UI and precise typography.

- [Webflow](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/webflow) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/webflow/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A perfect example of a modern, clean SaaS aesthetic that balances professional restraint with confident, growth-oriented messaging.
- [Wired](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/wired) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/wired/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A classic example of high-end editorial design that uses typography as the primary design element, perfect for establishing brand authority.
- [Wise](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/wise) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/wise/ · Tier-2 完整包 — Wise's design is a masterclass in using bold color and typography to make a complex financial service feel simple, fast, and accessible.

- [Zapier](https://opendesign.cc/en/sites/zapier) → 设计系统 https://opendesign.cc/packs/zapier/ · Tier-2 完整包 — A masterclass in clean, enterprise SaaS design that balances approachable warmth with authoritative professionalism through strong typography and intentional whitespace.
